title: WatchdogConfigData
description: Mirrors src/configurations/watchdog_config_data.py::WatchdogConfigData. Validates configurations/watchdogs/*.toml. Hand-maintained - see configurations/schemas/README.md for the sync policy.

healthcheck_url_key.description: Key to look up the watchdog's own ping URL in HEALTHCHECK_PING_URL. Defaults to "".

supervision.description: Optional supervision timing tunables (see ADR 0007). Omit the whole table to keep today's defaults.

SupervisionTimingData.description: Mirrors the SupervisionTimingData NamedTuple. All fields optional; each defaults to the watchdog.py constant it replaced.

check_interval.description: Seconds between successive worker health-check passes. Defaults to 30.0.

startup_grace_period.description: Seconds to wait after starting all workers before the first health-check pass. Defaults to 5.0.

stop_grace_period.description: Seconds to wait for a worker to exit after a graceful-stop signal before a hard kill. Defaults to 5.0.

watchdog_healthcheck_interval.description: Seconds between the watchdog's own healthchecks.io pings. Defaults to 30.0.

backoff_base.description: Base delay in seconds for the per-worker crash-loop restart backoff. Defaults to 2.0.

backoff_cap.description: Maximum delay in seconds the crash-loop restart backoff can reach. Defaults to 300.0.

crash_loop_count.description: Minimum number of restarts within crash_loop_window that counts as a crash loop. Defaults to 5.

crash_loop_window.description: Trailing window in seconds used to detect a crash loop. Defaults to 300.0.

WorkerData.description: Mirrors the WorkerData NamedTuple. One [[workers]] array-of-tables entry.

healthcheck_url_key.description: Key to look up the ping URL in HEALTHCHECK_PING_URL. Defaults to "".
